title: 24:12 ГўВҖВ” March 6, 2024
body_text:
24:12 ГўВҖВ” March 6, 2024
Update to CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation Part
Central 1 Banking Services
CEBA Loan Repayments, Administration Fees, Settlement, and Reconciliation Part
Section 3.1, Logging in to ServiceNow
Updated how to access ServiceNow using the Client Centre.
Section 4.2, Completing the CEBA Repayments Form in ServiceNow
Instructions for the ГўВҖВңForgiveness Amount Credited ГўВҖВ“ DateГўВҖВқ field were updated to reflect new date deadlines (January 18, 2024 or March 28, 2024).
Added instructions for how to fill out the new ГўВҖВңCumulative Interest Owing After This PaymentГўВҖВқ and ГўВҖВңMonthly Interest ApplicableГўВҖВқ fields.
Instructions were updated for the ГўВҖВңRepayment Category IndicatorГўВҖВқ field as itГўВҖВҷs no longer amendable.
Questions
Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
